mappings.control_id: Acceptance of Extraneous Untrusted Data with Trusted Data
mappings.notes: Agent memory store accepts writes from untrusted sources alongside trusted operational knowledge

mappings.control_name: Protection of Information at Rest — memory store protection

mappings.control_name: Malicious Code Protection — adversarial memory detection

mappings.control_name: Protection and Prevention — memory integrity controls

Register agent memory stores, context databases, and shared state systems in the ICT asset inventory; classify by data sensitivity

mappings.control_name: Learning and Evolving — memory poisoning post-mortem
mappings.notes: Conduct post-incident analysis for memory poisoning events; trace poisoned content to source and assess impact on agent decisions
